description: You are a manufacturing robotics engineer preparing a 3-DOF palletizing arm simulation. The simulation world is loaded, but the joint motors have been configured with incorrect placeholder parameters that will cause physically unrealistic or dangerous behavior. Reconfigure the 'PALLETIZING_ARM' robot's motors to match real servo hardware specifications: set the shoulder_motor (SHOULDER_JOINT) maxVelocity to 2.094 rad/s; set the elbow_motor (ELBOW_JOINT) maxVelocity to 3.14 rad/s and maxTorque to 56.0 N·m; and set the wrist_motor (WRIST_JOINT) minPosition to -6.28 rad and maxPosition to 6.28 rad. Save the configured world to /home/ga/Desktop/palletizing_arm_configured.wbt.
